steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: ”The factors that contributed to the extinction of the Caribbean ground sloth around 3000 BCE, for example, may be applicable to endangered species today.” This statement reveals why past lessons matter: they are applicable—meaning they fit and transfer to today's endangered species challenges.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Relevant” captures this exact fit—lessons are relevant when they apply to and matter for the current situation.

The other three don't work: “idiosyncratic” suggests uniqueness rather than applicability, “simplified” ignores the transfer of knowledge, and “debatable” contradicts the confident transfer shown in the passage.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
